title: Team Selection and Representation Overview
content: The KJSIM Sports Committee, in coordination with the Somaiya Sports Academy (SSA), is solely responsible for the selection of KJSIM teams for inter-college sports tournaments. Official announcements regarding trials and selections will be communicated to the entire student body exclusively through the official email channel by the Sports Committee.

title: Sports Selection Process Requirements
content: Attendance at officially scheduled trials is mandatory for consideration. Students who fail to attend trials, regardless of prior experience or past representation, will not be eligible for selection.

title: Practice and Training Requirements for Athletes
content: Once selected, student-athletes are required to participate in mandatory training and practice sessions scheduled by the Sports Committee and respective teams. A minimum attendance of 75% at these sessions is required to maintain eligibility for the final playing squad. Consistent absences without prior intimation or valid reason will lead to removal from the contingent.

title: Sports Representation Protocol
content: For inter-college tournaments, the Sports Committee will receive official invitations from the host institute and submit the final contingent list. Team allocation for specific tournaments will follow this structure: Somaiya Games – Selection in collaboration with SSA. Yudh & Anti-Ragging Sports Fest – Selection exclusively by the KJSIM Sports Committee. Any student representing KJSIM or Somaiya Vidyavihar University (SVU) in any sporting event (internal or external) must: Inform the KJSIM Sports Committee prior to participation. Obtain formal approval before confirming attendance (In case of representing KJSIM).

title: Eligibility for Attendance Benefits
content: Attendance benefits will be granted only to students whose names appear on the official contingent list maintained by the Sports Committee. The Sports Committee will be the sole authority for verifying and authenticating participation records.

title: Sports Leave Application Procedure
content: Students seeking attendance for sports representation must: Apply for leave via the Somaiya App under the 'Apply Leave' section. Select either 'Apply by Date' or 'Apply by Lecture' as appropriate. In the reason field, select 'Participation in Sports'. In the explanation, specify: Name of the tournament. Name of the organizing institute. Attach valid proof of participation, which may include: Official contingent list issued by the Sports Committee. Official selection email for the respective tournament. Submit the application for review. Important: Leave applications without proper proof will not be approved. Blanket approvals for attendance will not be issued under any circumstances. The Chairperson of the Sports Committee will approve leave only after verifying the authenticity of the provided details.

title: Expected Standards of Conduct for Athletes
content: All students representing KJSIM are ambassadors of the institute and must uphold the highest standards of integrity, discipline, and sportsmanship. These standards apply: During matches and competitions. Throughout training sessions. During travel, stay, and interactions with other teams, officials, and spectators.

title: Prohibited Behaviors in Sports
content: Use of offensive or abusive language. Unsporting conduct, including dissent against referee decisions. Physical or verbal aggression towards players, officials, or spectators. Any action that tarnishes the reputation of KJSIM.

title: Disciplinary Consequences for Sports Violations
content: Violations of the Code of Conduct will attract strict action, including but not limited to: First Offense: Formal warning and possible match suspension. Repeated or Severe Offense: Temporary or permanent suspension from the team. Disqualification from future tournaments. Referral to the Institute Disciplinary Committee for further action. Final Authority: All disciplinary decisions will be made by the KJSIM Sports Committee in consultation with the designated faculty coordinator.

title: Intra-College Sports Participation Requirements
content: All students must register through the official registration process announced by the Sports Committee. Impersonation, misrepresentation, or participation under another student's name will result in immediate disqualification and possible disciplinary action.

title: Conduct and Fair Play in Tournaments
content: Participants must maintain respect towards teammates, opponents, referees, and event organizers at all times. Verbal abuse, violence, or disruptive conduct will not be tolerated. Referee and official decisions are final and binding. Protests during play are not permitted.

title: Disciplinary Measures for Sports Tournaments
content: Possible penalties include: Official warning. Match forfeiture. Suspension from the ongoing tournament. Ban from future internal and external tournaments.

title: General Provisions of Sports Policy
content: This policy applies to all students of KJSIM, regardless of program or year of study. The Sports Committee reserves the right to interpret, amend, or update this policy as required. Students are expected to familiarize themselves with these guidelines and comply fully. Ignorance of the policy will not be accepted as a defense in disciplinary matters.
